vetting_process.title: Biometric Verification
vetting_process.description: Every provider must match their government-issued ID via live facial recognition.

vetting_process.title: Criminal Background Check
vetting_process.description: Comprehensive screening across national databases for maximum safety.

vetting_process.title: Vehicle & Equipment Audit
vetting_process.description: Regular physical inspections of recovery equipment and towing vehicles.

vetting_process.title: Quality Score Monitoring
vetting_process.description: Providers must maintain a 4.5+ star rating to remain active on the network.
